hero.title: From Bergamo to Zara
hero.subtitle: A Venetian civic dynasty across five centuries and four regimes

media.alt: Addobbati family group portrait with handwritten Italian caption identifying members
media.caption: The Addobbati family — Venetian cavalry officers turned Dalmatian citizens
The cittadini originari — hereditary civic class of the Venetian empire

media.alt: Austrian Kriegsarchiv service record page for the Addobbati family
media.caption: Archival record — from cavalry to the council of Nin

media.alt: Portrait of Simeone Boara, member of the intermarried Zara civic network
media.caption: Simeone Boara — the civic families endured across Venetian, French, and Austrian rule

media.alt: Habsburg Kriegsarchiv qualification record showing career and awards for Addobbati
media.caption: Imperial service — judiciary, postal administration, and cadastre
Ester Addobbati and Antonio Zerauschek — the line continues into interwar Zara
